title: WindCharge Optimizer
description: A Fabric mod that prevents other mods from reducing wind charge power below vanilla values. Server-side only, no config needed.
body:
WindCharge Optimizer

Ensures wind charges always deliver their full vanilla power, no matter what.

Some mods and server-side plugins (like Carpet Mod) can unintentionally reduce or nullify the knockback and explosion force of wind charges. WindCharge Optimizer silently protects against this by intercepting wind charge behavior server-side and restoring vanilla power if it was reduced.

What it does:

Runs entirely server-side
Prevents other mods from nerfing wind charge power below vanilla values
Never boosts beyond vanilla — purely protective
Zero config, zero commands, just drop it in and forget it
What it doesn't do:

Does not amplify or cheat wind charge power
Does not affect client-side rendering or visuals
Does not conflict with mods that leave wind charges at vanilla strength
Compatible with: Fabric 1.21.11
